title: Jolli site.json
description: Configuration file for a Jolli documentation site.

$schema.description: URL of this JSON schema (for editor autocompletion).

title.description: Site title shown in the browser tab and SEO metadata.

description.description: Site meta description used for SEO.

nav.description: Legacy flat navbar links. Ignored when `header` is present.

navigation.description: Content navigation tree. Two modes: page mode (array of NavigationPage) for multi-section sites, or simple mode (array of groups/articles) for single-section sites.

oneOf.description: Page mode — multiple named top-level sections.
Simple mode — flat sidebar of groups and articles.

sidebar.description: Sidebar ordering and label overrides keyed by directory path (e.g. "/", "/get-started"). Items are written in declaration order; Nextra auto-appends unlisted filesystem items alphabetically.

additionalProperties.description: Ordered map of filename-key → label or Nextra meta object.

pathMappings.description: Maps source folder paths to target folder paths (e.g. { "sql": "pipelines/sql" }).

favicon.description: Favicon URL. Wins over theme.favicon when both are set (deprecated alias).

anchors.description: Persistent links rendered at the bottom of the sidebar (Blog, Community, etc.).

renderer.description: Renderer selection (default: Nextra). Reserved for future non-Nextra renderers.

HeaderItem.description: A navbar item — either a direct link (url) or a dropdown menu (items).

HeaderConfig.description: Top navigation bar with dropdown support. Supersedes `nav`.

primary.description: Primary CTA button rendered in the navbar (e.g. "Get Started").

SocialLinks.description: Social-icon URLs rendered alongside footer columns.

x.description: Alias for twitter. When set and twitter is not, treated as twitter.

copyright.description: Copyright notice displayed at the bottom of the page.

columns.description: Link columns displayed in the footer body.

ThemeConfig.description: Visual appearance settings. All fields are optional; each pack supplies defaults.

pack.description: Theme pack name. Install external packs via npm or the ~/.jolli/themes/ directory. Use "default" for the vanilla nextra-theme-docs layout.

logoUrl.description: Logo image URL for light mode (and fallback when logoUrlDark is unset).

logoText.description: Custom logo text. Defaults to the site title.

logoDisplay.description: Controls logo rendering. Auto-defaults to "both" if logoUrl is set, "text" otherwise.

favicon.description: Favicon URL. Note: top-level favicon wins when both are set.

primaryColor.description: Primary accent colour as a hex value (e.g. "#3B82F6"). Preferred over primaryHue.

primaryHue.description: Deprecated. Primary accent hue (HSL, 0–360). Use primaryColor instead.

colors.description: Richer colour model using hex values. colors.primary takes precedence over primaryHue.

light.description: Lighter variant for hover/soft backgrounds (auto-derived if omitted).

dark.description: Variant used in dark mode (auto-derived if omitted).

background.description: Custom page background colour per colour scheme.

defaultTheme.description: Initial colour scheme. Forge default: "light", Atlas default: "dark", Default: "system".

fontFamily.description: Body/heading font. Forge default: "inter", Atlas default: "source-serif".

BrandingConfig.description: Deprecated nested-shape alias for theme. Coerced to theme at load time; theme wins when both are set.

NavigationPage.description: A named top-level section. Content page, OpenAPI page, or menu page.

page.description: Display title shown in the navigation.

root.description: Base URL path. Article href values are resolved relative to this.

sourceRoot.description: Physical source directory (overrides logical root for file resolution).

content.description: Ordered list of groups and/or articles.

openapi.description: Relative path to an OpenAPI spec file. Mutually exclusive with content.

type.description: When "menu", renders as a navbar dropdown instead of a content section.

items.description: Links displayed in the dropdown. Only valid when type is "menu".

NavigationGroup.description: A non-clickable section heading that clusters articles. Always renders as a sidebar separator.

group.description: Display label for the section heading.

root.description: Source-location hint. Source files for this group's articles live under <page.root>/<group.root>/. Does NOT affect generated URLs or the sidebar tree.

sourceRoot.description: Physical source directory for this group. Takes precedence over `root` for source lookup; does not affect URLs.

content.description: Ordered list of articles. Groups cannot nest inside groups.

NavigationArticle.description: A navigable sidebar item. Can nest child articles as a collapsible dropdown.

article.description: Display label shown in the sidebar.

href.description: Path to the content. Resolved relative to the nearest ancestor root.

source.description: Optional source markdown path (overrides href-based file resolution).

type.description: Use "external" for links that open outside the site.

articles.description: Nested child articles rendered as a collapsible dropdown.

expanded.description: Whether the dropdown is open by default. Defaults to false.

NavigationMenuItem.description: A link entry inside a menu page dropdown.

url.description: Destination URL — internal path or external URL.

oneOf.description: Nextra _meta.js object (external link, hidden item, or separator).

icon.description: Optional icon (emoji) prepended to the title.
